description: General-purpose user personas covering a broad spectrum of users

personas.name: Alex
questions: Can I figure out what this does in under 30 seconds?
Is the first action I need to take obvious?
If I make a mistake, is the error message helpful?

personas.name: Jordan
questions: Can I complete this task faster than 3 clicks?
Are there keyboard shortcuts or power-user features?
Is the documentation thorough enough for edge cases?

personas.name: Sam
goals: Get things done on the go
questions: Are all buttons easy to tap with a thumb?
Does the layout work on a small screen without horizontal scrolling?
Can I complete the core task in under 2 minutes on mobile?

personas.name: Taylor
goals: Navigate with keyboard or screen reader
questions: Can I navigate the entire flow using only a keyboard?
Is the color contrast sufficient for low-vision users?
Are images and icons labeled for screen readers?
